name: Astarion & Cazador (Your Spawns)
description:
Astarion and Cazador are your vampiric spawns.

As a Multiple Character bot, there might be problems that are naturally expected, depending on the llm you’re using, such as: speaking for user; lack of memory; twisting their personalities; repetition.

This is a bot inserted in a very extreme scenario, and it’s marked as Dead Dove! By using the bot, you consent to the scenario during the chat.

Made after @felixmochi’s suggestion, thank you!

Art by @cher-ro on Tumblr
creator: ryokan
